findings.title: F28d uses @field_validator instead of LogicField-style Annotated type alias — diverges from established pattern
findings.description: The PR adds a @field_validator(direction) method to StrategyRequest to validate the direction field. The existing codebase established a reusable Annotated type alias pattern (LogicField = Annotated[Literal[AND, OR], BeforeValidator(...)]) for the equivalent logic field validations across all 8 models. F28d does not follow that pattern — it introduces a @field_validator method instead of defining DirectionField = Annotated[Literal[long, short], ...] reusable across StrategyRequest, BotConfig (F28e), and future models. TODO item F28e created by this PR will need to repeat this inline validator rather than applying a shared type alias, widening the inconsistency.
findings.rule_citation: CLAUDE.md, Key Bugs Fixed: The established LogicField pattern (models.py line 7, applied at lines 48, 58-68) exists to define validated field types once and reuse them. F28d introduces a parallel validation style for direction that is inconsistent with the reuse pattern already present in the same file.
findings.evidence: Base commit models.py line 7: LogicField = Annotated[Literal[AND, OR], BeforeValidator(...)]. PR diff adds @field_validator(direction) @classmethod def validate_direction instead of a DirectionField type alias. The direction field type annotation also stays as str rather than the Literal-annotated form.

findings.title: F32 BotCard.tsx UI change has no visual verification note in JOURNAL.md
findings.description: F32 modifies BotCard.tsx (frontend UI component) by changing 8 optional chain expressions. CLAUDE.md requires: Visually verify UI changes in browser or flag not visually verified. The JOURNAL.md entry for F32 documents the code change but does not include a visual verification note or a not-visually-verified flag.
findings.rule_citation: CLAUDE.md, Working Style: Visually verify UI changes in browser or flag not visually verified.
findings.evidence: JOURNAL.md diff adds F32 bullet documenting the 8 optional chain fixes in BotCard.tsx with no visual verification flag. Compare with A14 in NEXT_RUN.md base content which explicitly noted Not visually verified.

residual_risks.description: F33 (TestTickStateTransitions fetch-path audit) is deferred. The PRs own NEXT_RUN.md Concerns section correctly flags that existing TestTickStateTransitions tests patch bot_runner._fetch rather than shared._fetch, meaning mock data may not reach the actual fetch path invoked by _tick(). This is a known test validity gap flagged but not fixed in this PR.

testing_gaps.description: F28d adds a @field_validator for StrategyRequest.direction but no unit test verifies the validator (e.g., a test posting direction=LONG or direction=sideways to /api/backtest and asserting a 422 response). The equivalent coverage for F28b validators exists; F28d coverage is absent from the test diff.
